---
title : "Template for Bjørnar's assignment using Gretl"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
##format: pdf
##format: docx
author:
  - name: John Doe
    affiliations:
      - Carnegie Mellon University
  - name: Jane Smith
    affiliations:
      - Stanford University
abstract: "Abc"
keywords: "Key 1, key2"
---

<!--
```{r}
#| echo=F
# Reads R-code into memory
#source("<name of directory and file>")
```
-->

# Step A: Research question and data
## 1. Research question
## 2. Data set
# Step B: Analysis
## 1. Data Description & Summary
## 2. Simple regression model
## 3. Multiple regression Model 
## 4. Dummy variable analysis
## 4. Non-linear effects
## 5. Model selection and analysis

*Model 1*
$$
price_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1Age_i + u_i 
$$

a.
a.
a.
a.
a.

*Model 2*
$$
price_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1Age_i + \beta_2WinterRain_i  +\beta_3temp_i + \beta_3HarvestRain_i + u_i 
$$

a.
a.
a.

## Conclusions
In this document 

[@wickham2015r]

## Appendix

### Figures

![rstudio](rstudio.png){#fig-rain}

See from @fig-rain

### Tables

| Right | Left | Default | Center |
|------:|:-----|---------|:------:|
|    12 | 12   | 12      |   12   |
|   123 | 123  | 123     |  123   |
|     1 | 1    | 1       |   1    |

: abc {#tbl-arf1}

See from @tbl-arf1

## References
